ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "journal_type" TEXT /* Type of journal (e.g., historical, religious) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the journal was first published */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the journal was last published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the journal was published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churches" (
  "church_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each church */,
  "church_name" TEXT /* Name of the church */,
  "church_description" TEXT /* Description of the church */,
  "denomination" TEXT /* Denomination of the church (e.g., Christian, Catholic) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the church was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("church_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal entry */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the entry belongs to */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the journal entry was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the journal entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the journal entry */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the journal entry */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file containing the journal entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_entries_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "church_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each church mention */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal entry the mention belongs to */,
  "church_id" INTEGER /* ID of the church mentioned */,
  "mention_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the church is mentioned in the entry */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the church mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_church_mentions_church_id FOREIGN KEY ("church_id") REFERENCES churches ("church_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_church_mentions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES journal_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_journals" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the journal belongs to */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the journal was added to the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query the result belongs to */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal entry in the result */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES journal_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
